title: Infosys receives INR 13,60,11,264 GST penalty order
detailed_summary: Infosys disclosed that it received communication from the Joint Commissioner of CGST for collection of a penalty totaling INR 13,60,11,264/-. The matter relates to an alleged non-payment of GST on the stay of employees of other GSTINs, described as distinct persons, in guest houses for business purposes for FY 2018-19 to 2022-23. Infosys stated that there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities. The communication was received on November 28, 2025 18:10 IST, and the company said disclosure was delayed while checking veracity and determining further steps.

key_facts.fact: Infosys received communication(s) for collection of penalty from the Joint Commissioner of CGST.
The total penalty disclosed was INR 13,60,11,264/-.
The penalty relates to alleged non-payment of GST on stay of employees of other GSTINs (distinct person) in Guest house for business purposes for FY 2018-19 to 2022-23.
Infosys stated that there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.
Infosys received the communication from the authority on November 28, 2025 18:10 IST.

litigation_or_regulatory_matters.description: Orders passed/action taken for alleged non-payment of GST on stay of employees of other GSTINs (distinct person) in Guest house for business purposes for FY 2018-19 to 2022-23.

important_text_spans.reason: Supports the disclosed monetary scale of the penalty.

important_text_spans.text: Demand issued for alleged non- payment of GST on stay of employees of other GSTINs (distinct person) in Guest house for business purposes for FY 2018-19 to 2022-23
important_text_spans.reason: Identifies the nature and period of the alleged GST contravention.

important_text_spans.text: None, there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.
